A/LAS-98 Laser Sentry

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search
Last updated: 1.006.300
Current patch: 1.006.300

Stratagems

Sentry
A/LAS-98 Laser Sentry

Permit Type

Traits
Hellpod  •  Sentry  •  Heavy Armor Penetrating  •  Heat  •  Beam

A/LAS-98 Laser Sentry

 100 DPS Fire
Armor Penetration
 Heavy
Ammo
Capacity
25s
“

A turret firing powerful and precise laser beams. Warning: overloading heat sink may cause adverse effects.

— Ship Management Terminal

The Laser Sentry is a close-range incendiary sentry stratagem from the Control Group Warbond.

Contents

  • 1 Stratagem Statistics
  • 2 Detailed Weapon Statistics
  • 3 Anatomy
  • 4 Tactical Information
  • 5 Applicable Ship Modules
  • 6 Media
  • 7 Change History

Stratagem Statistics

General
Call-in Time Standard 7.75 seconds
Upgraded 4.75 seconds
Uses Unlimited
Cooldown Standard 150 seconds
With Morale Augmentation 142.5 seconds
With Synthetic Supplementation 135 seconds
With All Upgrades 128.25 seconds
Sentry
Turn Rate Standard 96 °/s
Upgraded 160 °/s
Health Standard 400
Upgraded 600

LASER SENTRY

Anatomy

DefaultUpgraded

Part Name Health1 AV2 Location Durable2 % To Main3 Overflow Cap?4 Constitution5 Fatal? ExDR6
Main 400  Light 80% - - None Yes 0%

Disclaimer: Each highlighted part with a count has its own health. Parts without a count share health pools.

1) Parts with their HP listed as "Main" do not have their own individual health. All damage dealt to these parts is transferred to the enemy's Main health pool.
2) Refer to armor values and enemy durability as defined in Damage for more information.
3) Damage dealt to a part will also be transferred in part or in full to Main health. If set to 0%, no damage is transferred.
4) If set to "Yes", damage transferred to Main is capped by the combined health and constitution of the part.
5) Constitution acts as a secondary health pool that, once Main or limb health has been depleted, may decay. The first number is the total constitution and the second is the decay rate. If set to 0/s there is no decay and the constitution behaves as extra health.
6) ExDR means Explosion Damage Resistance, and can range from 0 to 100%. If set to 100%, the limb cannot take explosion damage; The explosion damage will instead target Main. Refer to Damage for more information.
  • Note: This mechanic, known as Affected By Explosion can only occur once per explosion, regardless of 100% ExDR parts hit, and the explosion's armor penetration must match or exceed Main armor to deal damage to Main. However, if the same explosion has already damaged Main, this mechanic will not trigger.

Part Name Health1 AV2 Location Durable2 % To Main3 Overflow Cap?4 Constitution5 Fatal? ExDR6
Main 600  Light 80% - - None Yes 50%

Disclaimer: Each highlighted part with a count has its own health. Parts without a count share health pools.

1) Parts with their HP listed as "Main" do not have their own individual health. All damage dealt to these parts is transferred to the enemy's Main health pool.
2) Refer to armor values and enemy durability as defined in Damage for more information.
3) Damage dealt to a part will also be transferred in part or in full to Main health. If set to 0%, no damage is transferred.
4) If set to "Yes", damage transferred to Main is capped by the combined health and constitution of the part.
5) Constitution acts as a secondary health pool that, once Main or limb health has been depleted, may decay. The first number is the total constitution and the second is the decay rate. If set to 0/s there is no decay and the constitution behaves as extra health.
6) ExDR means Explosion Damage Resistance, and can range from 0 to 100%. If set to 100%, the limb cannot take explosion damage; The explosion damage will instead target Main. Refer to Damage for more information.
  • Note: This mechanic, known as Affected By Explosion can only occur once per explosion, regardless of 100% ExDR parts hit, and the explosion's armor penetration must match or exceed Main armor to deal damage to Main. However, if the same explosion has already damaged Main, this mechanic will not trigger.

Tactical Information

  • The Laser Sentry has a targeting range of 50m and requires direct line of sight to valid targets. Note that enemy corpses and terrain can block the beam even if it has line of sight.
  • Laser Sentry will emit a beeping sound when its Internal Cooling Element (ICE) reaches around 80% of its capacity as a warning that it is about to burn out and self-destruct.
  • Laser Sentry will prefer to target small and medium sized enemies, but will still target heavily armored enemies if there are no other valid targets and also continue firing at the same target until said target is destroyed, the sentry overheats itself or the sentry is destroyed by enemy.
    • Due to the overheating nature and poor AI of the sentry it often has the least uptime out of all sentries as it will most likely self-destruct before reaching its full lifetime duration under intense assault.
    • The Laser Sentry is therefore best used under close supervision: helping it destroy its targets quicker will decrease the amount of time it spends firing and give it time to cool down over its lifetime.
  • Identically to the Gatling Sentry it will fire continuously when transitioning between nearby targets.

Applicable Ship Modules

The following Ship Modules affect the A/Las-98 Laser Sentry:

Department Ship Module Effect
Bridge Morale Augmentation Reduces cooldown time for all Stratagems by 5%.
Engineering
Bay 		Synthetic Supplementation Reduces cooldown time for Sentry stratagems by 10%.
Advanced Construction Increases the health of the Sentry stratagems by 50%.
Robotics
Workshop 		Dynamic Tracking Removes deployment time for Sentry stratagems.
High-Quality Lubricant Increases the rotation speed of the Sentry stratagems.
Blast Absorption Sentries takes 50% less damage from explosions.

Media

  • Tutorial Video Demonstrating Use of the A/LAS-98 Laser Sentry

Patch
Description

1.006.300
2026-06-16

Change

  • Sentry health increased by 100%
    • Health increased from 200 to 400

1.006.202
2026-04-28

Change

  • Increased heat capacity from 200 to 250

  • Now displays correct heat build up
